title: Glenmorangie 12YO Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700mL - 2 for $125 Express Delivered / C&C @ Liquorland
body:
Deal: Glenmorangie 12YO Single Malt Scotch Whisky 700mL - 2 for $125 Express Delivered / C&C @ Liquorland

[shaidas] Not good ..definitely not 12 YO .. taste maybe subjective but this is NOT a 12 year old whiskey unless it has been aged in a glass bottle and not in oak. The packaging is better than the product ..of course that is in my opinion.. YMMV
[spiinl] I agree. It used to be a good drop. I believe the LVMH takeover made it worse.
[YOTR] you can question the quality but pretty naive to be questioning the age.
[boozed] You have good evidence that one of the biggest names in single malt Scotch whisky is committing fraud, I presume?
MMVMDV
[shaidas] I say it as I taste it.. Have been making my own for more than 12 years .. I know what 12 years in a barrel tastes like Biggest names in single malt Scotch whisky ..where did you get that from ?
[boozed] I know how to use a search engine.
You'll have to sit down with Bill Lumsden MBE and tell him what he's doing wrong.
[shaidas] @boozed: I can see you know how to use a search engine and AI ..that much is obvious .. stop trolling..my views are my views, do not like it buy your own and give a review.. like I said YMMV .. if you want to keep on..then let's see how much AI helps you
[fantombloo] Great scotch at a great price IMO. Good enough to savour with a mate on a Saturday night, simple enough to plop on the couch with in front of the telly.
[muwu] I agree, in that I did not find this scotch particularly enjoyable among the many single malts I've had a bottle of.
Caution to maybe not jump on this deal (2-for) if you've never tried before.
Talisker 10 can be had for $70-$80 during good deals, it blows this out of the water.
[shaidas] This is a good enough drop to savour with a mate on a Saturday night, simple enough to plop on the couch in front of the telly .. and I agree but that is All
